components.text:
What follows are the physiques recorded within these pages — gathered from the ancient study, cross-referenced against texts collected over many years of travel.

They are organized by rarity. From those common enough that many cultivators carry them unknowingly, to those confirmed only a handful of times in recorded history.

Study them carefully.

Your physique is already decided. You were born with it, and no effort will change what you were given.

But knowing what you carry changes everything that follows.
